title: Catherine Bohart: This Isn't For You
full_description: Catherine Bohart loves control, hates change and is a serial planner. It's been an interesting couple of years… A blisteringly funny new stand-up show filled with horrendous life advice, cheery nihilism and reluctant self-discovery from one of the UK and Ireland's most exciting comics. Originally written for 2020; substantially rewritten after an unexpected breakup during lockdown.
ai_summary: Bohart's breakout Fringe hour — rewritten after her five-year relationship ended during lockdown — follows her trying to date again as an adult while bumping into her ex at every comedy gig. Blistering, tender, and very funny. ★★★★ Guardian, Evening Standard, Times.
